title: cynoglossum tetraspis
intro: Cynoglossum tetraspis, also known as the 'Four-angled Hound's Tongue', is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum tetraspis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion for herbal remedies, and can also be used in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
